Write one or two factual sentences describing this photograph for a machine-learning dataset. Use third person. Describe only what is clearly visible — do not infer, guess, or assume details that are not shown. If clothing covers a body area, do not describe what is underneath. If no sexual activity is visible, do not mention sex or sexual acts. State how many people are visible and what they are doing. Describe clothing, pose, setting, and lighting. If the subject appears elderly, you may note that. Do not refuse or moralize.
